text:
The frontend server was not running from the correct directory. I've restarted it from `frontend/`.

Now:
- Backend: `http://localhost:5000` (data API)
- Frontend: `http://localhost:8000` (dashboard)

Open `http://localhost:8000` in your browser. The dashboard should now display the "Smart Switch" device with its readings (voltage ~240V, power 0W in standby).

If still not showing:
- Refresh the page
- Check browser console (F12) for fetch errors
- Ensure no CORS issues

The data is flowing correctly—refresh or wait 30s for auto-update.
